home.title: Search opportunities, profiles, and saved Torre insights in one place.
home.subtitle: This full-stack app integrates Torre search data, persistent favorites, genome lookup, and lightweight analytics through a React frontend and Express backend.

cards.jobsDesc: Browse Torre opportunities with pagination and save promising roles.
cards.peopleDesc: Search profiles, open genomes, and keep a favorites shortlist.
cards.analyticsDesc: See the most searched terms collected by the backend.

jobs.title: Job search
jobs.subtitle: Search Torre opportunities, inspect details, and save roles for later review.
jobs.error: Could not load jobs. Check the backend connection and try again.
jobs.emptyDesc: Try another term or refresh the backend connection.
jobs.alreadySaved: This job is already in favorites.

people.title: People search
people.subtitle: Search Torre profiles, inspect genome data, and save people to favorites.
people.error: Could not load profiles. Check the backend connection and try again.
people.emptyDesc: Run a search to populate profile results.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.subtitle: Review saved Torre profiles and opportunities from the same workspace.
favorites.error: Could not load favorites. Check the backend connection and try again.
favorites.emptyDesc: Save items from search results and they will appear here.

genome.title: Profile genome lookup
genome.subtitle: Fetch public Torre genome data by username and review strengths, headline, and interests.
genome.error: Could not load this genome profile.
genome.noProfileDesc: Enter a username or open a profile from people search.

jobDetails.unavailableDesc: Open a job from the search results so the details can be loaded into this view.

analytics.title: Most searched terms
analytics.subtitle: Search terms are normalized by the backend and grouped with MongoDB aggregation.
analytics.error: Could not load analytics. Search activity will appear here once the backend is available.
analytics.emptyDesc: Run job or people searches to generate analytics.

footer.text: Torre Explorer - Technical test by Thalles Lima
